Pricing

Pricing that reflects how you use the platform

No two TMC operations are the same. A boutique TMC with ten clients and a national TMC managing thousands of travellers need completely different commercial structures — so that's what we build.

Why there's no off-the-shelf price

Cinturon360 is a platform for TMC operations — and TMC operations vary enormously in client volume, workflow complexity, integration requirements, and commercial structure. A fixed SaaS tier would either undercharge large operations or price out smaller ones. We don't think that's the right model for how TMCs actually work.

🏢

TMC operators

  • Priced around your managed client portfolio
  • Scales with client volume and workflow complexity
  • Includes platform support and onboarding
  • Commercial flexibility as your client base grows
Discuss your program
💼

Corporate programs

  • Deployed through or alongside your TMC
  • Priced around managed traveller volume
  • Policy, approvals, and reporting scope
  • Single-entity or multi-entity configurations
Discuss your program
✈️

Leisure & HNW programs

  • Tailored to program complexity and advisor volume
  • Flexible arrangements for boutique advisory practices
  • Includes governance and oversight tooling
  • White-label options available on request
Discuss your program

What goes into a commercial model

When we scope a commercial model together, we look at:

Number of managed clients or travellers
Workflow complexity and automation requirements
Integration scope (GDS, NDC, direct suppliers, ERP)
Reporting and visibility requirements
Multi-entity or single-entity configuration
Onboarding and implementation scope
Support and SLA requirements
Commercial growth trajectory

Ready to talk about your operation?

Cinturon360 is in active development and onboarding design partners now. Reach out to start a conversation about your program and what a commercial model looks like for your situation.
